name: SRX Global Inc.
business: The company sells premium and super-premium pet health and wellness products under the Halo brand, including food, treats, and supplements for dogs and cats. It sells through e-commerce platforms, brick-and-mortar retail stores, and international distributors.
sellsTo: Brick-and-mortar retail (specialty pet stores, grocery chains)

exposures.sentence: The Company s continuing operations consist of the pet health and wellness business formerly operated by Better Choice.
The majority of net sales are generated online, reflecting both the Company s focus on digital channels and consumer preference for online purchasing.
